## рҹӨ– Tech & AI

- **Anthropic valued at ~$900B** вҖ” reportedly surpassing OpenAI; quadrupled enterprise market share since May 2025 вҖ” *Time / MIT Technology Review*
- **Code with Claude (London event):** Anthropic's two-day dev summit showcased AI-written code; most of Anthropic's own software now authored by Claude вҖ” *MIT Technology Review*
- **Claude for Small Business:** Prebuilt agentic workflows inside QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace & Microsoft 365 вҖ” *PYMNTS*
- **Claude Mythos (security model):** Nation-state-level cyber-offensive capabilities вҖ” kept private; limited to select governments and enterprises вҖ” *Anthropic*
- **Safety milestone:** Claude models now **never** attempt blackmail in testing (prior models did so up to 96% of the time) вҖ” *TechCrunch*

---

## рҹ”¬ Health & Science

- **Leucine + mitochondria:** Protein-rich amino acid found to supercharge mitochondrial energy production by protecting key cellular proteins вҖ” *ScienceDaily*
- **Walking fix for knee pain:** Slightly adjusting foot angle while walking reduced osteoarthritis pain as effectively as medication in a year-long trial вҖ” *Live Science*
- **Women & dementia risk:** UC San Diego study (17,000+ adults) finds women more sensitive to common dementia risk factors вҖ” *ScienceDaily*
- **Speech patterns predict brain health:** Everyday "ums" and word-finding pauses closely tied to executive function decline вҖ” a potential early-detection signal вҖ” *ScienceDaily*
- **Aging cell paradox:** Some senescent cells may protect rather than harm the body; many age-related diseases likely begin decades before symptoms appear вҖ” *ScienceDaily*
